animations.prompt: Front-facing game sprite idle animation. Subtle chest breathing and gentle sway. Character facing the camera, stationary.
Front-facing game sprite waving hand animation. Character facing the camera. One arm raises and waves side to side.
Front-facing game sprite magic casting animation. Character facing the camera. Arms raise, magical gesture, hands glow.
Front-facing game sprite celebration animation. Character facing the camera. Fist pump or victory pose.
